overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking through a muddy western town during a rainstorm. The character progresses from the town center past wooden buildings, crosses railroad tracks, and enters the open prairie known as 'The Heartlands' while horse-drawn carriages periodically pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy main street of western frontier town

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the muddy road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the muddy street past wooden depot buildings

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving past the character on the muddy road

entered.detail: two-story wooden western-style building with porch and weathered planks
rustic wooden post fence lining the right side of the muddy street
tall wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires extending along the road

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a muddy street in a western town during a rainstorm. A wooden depot building lines the left side while a rustic fence borders the right. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, kicking up mud as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: railroad crossing at town edge transitioning to open country

events.description: character crosses railroad tracks and leaves the immediate town area
rider on horseback gallops past on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, crossing railroad tracks at the town's edge into open landscape

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past on the right side of the muddy trail

entered.detail: metal railway tracks crossing the muddy path at grade level
raised earth mound alongside the railroad right-of-way
large boulder sitting beside the trail on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character crosses railroad tracks at the edge of town, transitioning from the built environment to open countryside. The wooden depot recedes behind as the character passes a large boulder and dirt embankment. A lone horse rider gallops past on the right while telegraph poles continue along the left side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with distant hills

events.description: horse-drawn carriage travels past on the right side of the trail
location text 'THE HEARTLANDS' appears in the bottom right corner of the screen

agents.ego_description: walking through open prairie as carriages pass by on the muddy trail

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling along the muddy trail heading in the same direction

entered.detail: cluster of deciduous trees dotting the right side of the prairie landscape
tall dry grass lining both sides of the muddy trail in the open field

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the open prairie known as 'The Heartlands,' with grassy hills rising in the distance. A horse-drawn carriage travels along the trail on the right while scattered trees dot the landscape. The location name appears on screen as the rain continues to fall across the wide-open western expanse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, muddy town street into the vast, rain-swept expanse of the open prairie. It begins with the character walking past a wooden depot and rustic fences as a horse-drawn carriage kicks up mud in the downpour. As the character reaches the edge of town, the scene shifts across railroad tracks and past a large boulder, leaving the buildings behind while a lone rider gallops past. The environment then opens up into the wide grasslands of The Heartlands, where the camera tracks the character past scattered trees and another carriage. Finally, the view expands toward distant grassy hills under the persistent rain as the location name appears on screen.
